emails.subject: My email address
emails.body: My email address Susan, Thank you for sending all those emails to the EWS-CCT address. I noticed that the Ed Hlopak you sent the original emails to was the Ed, Sr my father. He used to work at EE&CC. Have these files already been sent to E&Y? If not, I'll get it done right away. Regards, Ed Hlopak Sr. Project Manager Enron Wholesale Services 713-345-9363 (office) 713-417-4412 (cell)

emails.subject: RE: My email address
emails.body: RE: My email address Edward, I thought I noticed a Senior designation and thought it kind of strange. Yes, all the documents were provided to E&Y in hard copy form in the binders delivered to Raj last week. The only document not included was the Florida Power Light Company ("FPL") agreement. However, under the EWS-CCT address you now possess all the Master Netting Agreements (including the FPL agreement) in the electronic/pdf format. If you want to present E&Y with the electronic/pdf versions, you will need to do that. Susan To: Bailey, Susan

emails.subject: RE: My email address
emails.body: Thanks, Susan. I'll get it done. Ed Hlopak Sr. Project Manager Enron Wholesale Services 713-345-9363 (office) 713-417-4412 (cell) To: Hlopak, Ed
